response.step_by_step_log:
1. Extracted song title "幸せになって" from on-screen text at 00:00. 
2. Performed web search: '"幸せになって" original artist and lyrics'. 
3. Confirmed original artist as "まるりとりゅうが" (Maruri to Ryuga). 
4. Obtained Japanese lyrics and translation from search results. 
5. Identified performers in the video as Airani Iofifteen, Rikka, and Roberu. 
6. Mapped scenes based on the song performance and the subsequent talk segment.
response.global_summary: A video snippet featuring a vocal performance of the song "幸せになって" (Shiawase ni Natte) by Maruri to Ryuga, performed by VTubers Airani Iofifteen, Rikka, and Roberu, followed by a post-performance conversation among them.

scenes.description: VTubers Airani Iofifteen, Rikka, and Roberu perform a song, with the title "幸せになって" displayed on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
何度も問いかけた
自問自答繰り返した先に
答えがあるのなら
このまま探してみようか
あなたの未来図に
私は少しでもいれたかな
あなたのいない世界は
想像さえつかなかった

もしもあなたが
あの子を選んだ瞬間に
私が頭の中
駆け巡っていって
「私以外で幸せになれるはずない」
他で幸せになってね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I asked myself many times
After repeating the soul-searching
If there is an answer
Should I keep searching like this?
In your future map
Could I be there, even a little bit?
A world without you
I couldn't even imagine

If you
At the moment you chose that girl
Inside my head
Running through my mind
"You couldn't be happy with anyone but me"
Please be happy with someone else.

scenes.description: Post-performance conversation between Airani Iofifteen, Rikka, and Roberu.
